✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

WebSockets: RFC 6455 client with TLS/compression. Server-side (WebSocketServer) is separately fenced to Network.framework platforms and marked unavailable on watchOS.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of Starscream? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
